response:
The user is asking whether the vendor provided information about the size of the carton they would have used if they had not followed packaging optimization guidelines. They also mention that this type of information is typically collected during a pilot shipment and are inquiring whether this was done for the Centric manual pilot shipments.

Rewritten without PII:

Did the vendor provide the size of the carton they would have used if they did not follow the packaging optimization guidelines? I guess normally we might also collect this information during a pilot shipment as well. Did we do that for the pilot shipments related to the manual process?
